Description: "Amesterdam's other name is Cycle city thus i chose this image of cycles on a bridge in Amsterdam"
"A quiet, rainy street in an old European town, lined with stone houses and autumn trees. I chose this place because it gives a peaceful, nostalgic mood"

"A beautiful view of Keukenhof Gardens near Amsterdam . I chose this destination because it’s one of the most stunning spring gardens in the world and represents the natural beauty of the Netherlands"

"A charming narrow alley in a coastal town in Portugal, with colorful buildings leading to a bright view of the ocean. I chose this place because it captures the warm, peaceful vibe of Portuguese seaside villages"
"A breathtaking  view of a Swiss village surrounded by colorful autumn trees. I chose this destination because Switzerland’s natural landscapes are stunning "
"A vibrant view of Chefchaouen, Morocco’s famous Blue City, with its unique blue-painted houses surrounded by mountains. I chose this place because of its colorful architecture and cultural beauty"

"A stunning view of traditional Tunisian architecture with beautifully decorated domes, blue doors, and warm sunset lighting. I chose this place because Tunisia’s Mediterranean culture and historic designs are incredibly unique and inspiring"
"A tropical beach scene in Thailand featuring traditional long-tail boats. I chose this destination because Thailand’s beaches are world-famous for their beauty and peaceful atmosphere"

"A stunning aerial view of Rio de Janeiro with Sugarloaf Mountain, blue bays, and the vibrant city below. I chose this destination because Rio is one of the most iconic and scenic cities in the world"

"A beautiful  view of Mount Fuji with cherry blossoms in full bloom by the lake. I chose this destination because it is one of Japan’s most iconic and peaceful landscapes, especially during the spring season"
